scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:dp
scripts.build:dp: sass --no-source-map scss/dp-style.scss:dp-style.css && npm run build:patterns && cp dp-style.css ../../plugins/swell-dp/assets/css/dp-style.css && cp javascript/dp-page-title.js ../../plugins/swell-dp/assets/js/dp-page-title.js && cp javascript/fade-in.js ../../plugins/swell-dp/assets/js/fade-in.js && cp javascript/dp-vertical-cta.js ../../plugins/swell-dp/assets/js/dp-vertical-cta.js && cp javascript/loading.js ../../plugins/swell-dp/assets/js/loading.js
